iot.topicrule.timestreamtimestamp.CfnAbo: The value to use for the entry's timestamp. If blank, the time that the entry was processed is used.

iot.topicrule.timestreamtimestamp.Unit.Description: The precision of the timestamp value that results from the expression described in `value`.

iot.topicrule.timestreamtimestamp.Value.Description: An expression that returns a long epoch time value.
